series_metadata.series_description: This is a license for entities that receive producer milk and are responsible for paying the producer. (This excludes producer marketing organizations). Dealers buy milk and process it. The license ensures that the buyer of the milk can pay the producer. Our file on the dealer includes financial statements (confidential information) evaluated when a license is issued. The license is perpetual.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep for 4 years after a license is inactive. A license is active until the license holder goes out of business or the license is revoked. ; Paper: Keep for 4 years after a license is inactive. A license is active until the license holder goes out of business or the license is revoked., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
